sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 85:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 85:1
items.html: Seven of direct light, from Bina and below. Here, too, the light of Bina is in the vessel of Keter, etc., through the light of Yesod in the vessel of Netzah, and three of reflected light—Hod, Yesod and Malchut—in the vessels of Hod, Yesod and Malchut.
